---
title: "Team Challenge Scoreboard"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../slides/custom.scss]
    slide-number: false
    controls: false
    progress: false
    center: true
    transition: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)

# =====================================================================
# Data loaded from CSVs produced by scripts/update-team-points.R
# =====================================================================

scoreboard <- read_csv("../team_points.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    total = pair_coding + assignments + quizzes + fun_challenge,
    team_name = fct_reorder(team_name, total)
  )

rankings <- read_csv("../team_rankings.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

current_week = rankings |> 
  filter(week_points > 0)  |> 
  filter(week == max(week)) |> 
  filter(row_number() == 1) |> 
  pull(week) + 1


# Color: leading team(s) get highlight color, others get gray
max_pts <- max(scoreboard$total)
scoreboard <- scoreboard |>
  mutate(is_leader = total == max_pts & total > 0)
```

## Week `r current_week` Standings

```{r}
#| label: scoreboard-chart
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5.5

# Bar chart
ggplot(scoreboard, aes(x = total, y = team_name, fill = is_leader)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = total),
    hjust = -0.3,
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#e67e22", "FALSE" = "#95a5a6"),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Total Points",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )
```

---

## Rankings Over Time

```{r}
#| label: rankings-chart
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5.5
#| fig-alt: "Bump chart showing team rankings over time, with rank on the y-axis (1 at top) and week on the x-axis. Each team is a colored line."

n_teams <- n_distinct(rankings$team_name)

rankings_filtered <- rankings |>
  filter(week < current_week)

last_week <- max(rankings_filtered$week)

label_data <- rankings_filtered |>
  filter(week == last_week)

rankings_filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = rank, color = team_name, group = team_name)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = label_data,
    aes(label = team_name),
    nudge_x = 0.3,
    direction = "y",
    hjust = 0,
    segment.size = 0.3,
    segment.color = "gray70",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = seq_len(n_teams),
    labels = \(x) paste0("#", x)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq_len(max(rankings$week)),
    labels = \(x) paste0("Wk ", x),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.25))
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

---

## Point Breakdown

```{r}
#| label: scoreboard-table

scoreboard |>
  arrange(desc(total), team_name) |>
  select(
    Team = team_name,
    `Pair Coding` = pair_coding,
    Assignments = assignments,
    Quizzes = quizzes,
    `Fun Challenge` = fun_challenge,
    Total = total
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"))
```
